entry.title: About Me
entry.summary: I am Fan Wang, a master student majoring in Nano materials and technology from professor Zhonglin Wang’s nanoscience group, Beijing Institute of Nanoenergy and Nanosystems at the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences in China.

entry.title: Research
entry.summary:
My Research

  • RESEARCH INTREST
  • RESEARCHES AND PROJECTS
  • PAPERS AND PATENTS
  • CONFERENCES

Research Interest

Using advanced Nano technology to to do more valuable, interesting, challenging and interdisciplinary research about Wearable Electronics to solve some medical problems, is the motivation for my research. Minimally invasive surgery minimizes the trauma of patients compared with traditional open surgery. Target drug delivery enhances the drug efficacy while weakens unwanted side effects compared with conventional systemic administration. My future research effort will concentrate on developing medical miniature robots that work in vivo and in vitro, which can be potentially deployed in minimally invasive diagnosis and therapeutics. Issues such as biocompatibility and biodegradability will be taken into consideration in the design of the medical robots. When deployed inside human bodies, the feedback information of the robots is limited and obscured, in which scenarios accurate and reliable actuation and control of these robots are challenging and will be investigated in my following research.

entry.title: About Traveling
entry.summary: A Trip Without

entry.title: About Water Team
entry.summary:
Our Team

Team Water is a Middle Size League Team of Beijing Information Science & Technology University. The team was founded in 2003.Water has participated in the China Open from 2006 to 2019, World Championships from 2010 to 2019.

Our Dream

We proposed that the ultimate goal of the RoboCup Initiative to be stated as follows:

By the middle of the 21st century, a team of fully autonomous humanoid robot soccer players shall win a soccer game, complying with the official rules of FIFA, against the winner of the most recent World Cup.
